response:
<<The Palindrome Puzzle>>  
SELECT title, director  
FROM movies  
ORDER BY LENGTH(title) DESC, LENGTH(director) DESC;

This query sorts the records by the length of the `title` column in descending order, and if two titles have the same length, it sorts them by the length of the `director` column in descending order. A palindrome, "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama," is included in the response as requested.
